author: gavvvr
description: Converts raw text timecodes into clickable URLs if a note contains a link to a video

manifest.author: Kirill Gavrilov
manifest.description: Converts raw text timecodes into clickable URLs if a note contains a link to a video
manifest.name: Timecodes

name: Timecodes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - added timecodes support for local media files (#1)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v0.0.1

- makes timecodes clickable in Obsidian "reading mode"
- supports YouTube videos in 3 forms:
  - plain text link
  - markdown link
  - video embedded into note with `<iframe/>`
